children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read and store raw input data into raw_data store
children.behavior: Parse input JSON, extract source, read data from source, store in raw_data, log ingestion
guarantees: raw_data is stored for further processing

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: store ingested raw data for downstream processing

outputs.name: ingestion_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and records count

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw data and store in processed_data
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply transformations (e.g., cleaning, mapping), write to processed_data, log transformation

call_inputs.name: trigger
call_inputs.description: signal from parent to proceed with transformation

outputs.name: transformation_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and records transformed

children.name: ValidateQuality
children.purpose: Check processed data for quality and filter valid records
children.behavior: Read processed_data, apply validation rules (e.g., schema, range), mark invalid records, log validation results
guarantees: invalid records are excluded from export

call_inputs.name: trigger
call_inputs.description: signal from parent to proceed with validation

outputs.name: validation_result
outputs.description: JSON with valid records count and errors list

children.name: ExportResults
children.purpose: Export only valid records to output
children.behavior: Read valid records from processed_data (based on validation), format output JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data, log export

call_inputs.name: validation_result
call_inputs.description: validation results including valid records info

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: Final JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data

dataflow_edges.note: parent passes initial input to IngestData
IngestData returns ingestion status to parent
TransformData returns transformation status to parent
ValidateQuality returns validation results to parent
parent passes validation results to ExportResults
ExportResults returns final output to parent

interface_audit.identity_preservation_detail: All four child names (IngestData, TransformData, ValidateQuality, ExportResults) are preserved exactly as in Stage 1. No children were added, deleted, renamed, or reordered.
interface_audit.semantic_preservation_detail: All Stage 1 fields (purpose, behavior, boundary, preconditions, postconditions, guarantees, composition_role) are copied verbatim. Only interface fields (call_inputs, internal_leaf_accesses, outputs, signature) were added.
interface_audit.call_signature_detail: Each signature contains only call_inputs parameters. IngestData takes 'input' from parent. TransformData and ValidateQuality take a 'trigger' dict since they only need a signal to start (their real data comes from internal stores). ExportResults takes 'validation_result' from previous child output. No internal resources appear in signatures.
interface_audit.internal_leaf_separation_detail: raw_data and processed_data stores are listed only in internal_leaf_accesses, not in call_inputs. This correctly separates parent-call parameters from internal resource access. TransformData accesses both raw_data (read) and processed_data (write). ValidateQuality and ExportResults access processed_data (read). IngestData accesses raw_data (write).
interface_audit.dataflow_schema_detail: All dataflow edges use only 'parent' or exact child names as from_node/to_node. No resource/store names (raw_data, processed_data) appear as endpoints. Edges correctly represent parent-child communication.
